sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, DATE '1995-05-23'), (2, DATE '2000-01-15');
SELECT id, date_part('year', event_date) AS event_year FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2023-03-10' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_part('month', event_date) AS event_month FROM test_dates WHERE date_part('year', event_date) = 2000;
